title: altensteinia chiogena
intro: Altensteinia chiogena, also known as Himalayan altensteinia, is a flowering plant species in the family Gentianaceae. The plant is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Altensteinia chiogena are said to include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of decoctions or infusions, as well as being dried and consumed as a powder or added to tea blends.
